items.title: How does Chinese Zodiac AI determine my zodiac sign and element?
items.description: Chinese Zodiac AI determines your zodiac sign by your birth year according to the Chinese lunar calendar. There are 12 animal signs (Rat, Ox, Tiger, Rabbit, Dragon, Snake, Horse, Goat, Monkey, Rooster, Dog, and Pig) in a 12-year cycle. Your element is determined by the last digit of your birth year in a 10-year cycle (Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, Water). Our Chinese Zodiac AI calculator instantly determines both your zodiac animal and element when you input your birth date.

items.title: How does Chinese Zodiac AI calculate Bazi animal and element?
items.description: Chinese Zodiac AI calculates your animal sign by taking your birth year and applying traditional formulas. The remainder after dividing by 12 determines your animal sign (0=Monkey, 1=Rooster, etc.). For your element, Chinese Zodiac AI analyzes the last digit of your birth year: 0-1=Metal, 2-3=Water, 4-5=Wood, 6-7=Fire, 8-9=Earth. Our Chinese Zodiac AI automates this process for accuracy, especially considering lunar calendar adjustments.

items.title: What insights does Chinese Zodiac AI provide about my element?
items.description: Chinese Zodiac AI reveals how your element (Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, or Water) influences your personality traits, strengths, and potential challenges. Wood people tend to be creative; Fire individuals are dynamic; Earth types are practical; Metal people are organized; Water individuals are intuitive. Chinese Zodiac AI also suggests career affinities, relationship patterns, and balance strategies based on your element.

items.title: How does Chinese Zodiac AI analyze love compatibility?
items.description: Chinese Zodiac AI analyzes compatibility by considering both animal signs and elements. Some animal combinations naturally harmonize (like Rat with Dragon), while others create tension. Elements also influence compatibility: Wood feeds Fire, Fire creates Earth, Earth bears Metal, Metal collects Water, and Water nourishes Wood. Chinese Zodiac AI identifies the most harmonious relationships involving complementary elements rather than identical ones.

items.title: How does Chinese Zodiac AI interpret the 5 elements?
items.description: Chinese Zodiac AI interprets the five elements in Bazi philosophy: Wood (木), Fire (火), Earth (土), Metal (金), and Water (水). Each element has distinct characteristics that Chinese Zodiac AI analyzes: Wood represents growth; Fire embodies enthusiasm; Earth signifies stability; Metal symbolizes precision; Water reflects adaptability. Chinese Zodiac AI examines how these elements interact in cycles of generation and control, creating a complex system of balance.

items.title: How does Chinese Zodiac AI use the 60-year cycle in analysis?
items.description: Chinese Zodiac AI analyzes the 60-year cycle created by combining the 12 animal signs with the five elements in Yin and Yang forms. Each element appears with each animal sign once in Yang form and once in Yin form before repeating. For example, 1984 was Yang Wood Rat, while 1985 was Yin Wood Ox. Chinese Zodiac AI uses this 60-year cycle (Sexagenary cycle or Ganzhi) to provide detailed understanding of energetic influences affecting individuals.
